mapper.sql: id, user_id, from_user_id, `type`, title, content, target_type, target_id, extra_data, is_read, created_at, read_at
mapper.insert: insert into notification (user_id, from_user_id, `type`, title, content, target_type, target_id, extra_data, is_read, created_at, read_at) values (#{user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{from_user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{target_type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{target_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{extra_data,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{is_read,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{read_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into notification
user_id,
from_user_id,
`type`,
title,
content,
target_type,
target_id,
extra_data,
is_read,
created_at,
read_at,
#{user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{from_user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},

mapper.update:
update notification
user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
from_user_id = #{from_user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`type` = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
target_type = #{target_type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
target_id = #{target_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
extra_data = #{extra_data,jdbcType=OTHER},
is_read = #{is_read,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
read_at = #{read_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update notification set user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, from_user_id = #{from_user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `type` = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_type = #{target_type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_id = #{target_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, extra_data = #{extra_data,jdbcType=OTHER}, is_read = #{is_read,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, read_at = #{read_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
